## Scene Type Breakdown

     Minimum requirements: at least 1 rest scene per Area, at least 1 entry travel scene. -->

| travel | [N] | NODE-NNN, … | Entry/exit scenes |

| combat | [N] | NODE-NNN, … | |

| shop | [N] | NODE-NNN, … | |
| quest_event | [N] | NODE-NNN, … | |
| cutscene | [N] | NODE-NNN, … | |
| **Total** | [N] | | |

**Exit travel scene(s)**: NODE-NNN → LOC-[Destination], NODE-NNN → LOC-[Destination]

## Area State Variables

<!-- Variables that track state within this Area specifically.
     Use $area_[AreaShortName]_* naming prefix. -->

| Variable | Type | Default | Set When | Effect |
|---|---|---|---|---|
| $area_[name]_explored | counter (0–100) | 0 | Each LOC visited | Tracks % discovered |
| $area_[name]_cleared | flag | false | All combat scenes resolved | Unlocks fast travel |
| $area_[name]_[event] | flag | false | [Specific event node] | [Effect on area state] |
